THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $94.00, CASE IS DISMISSED AND DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. IS AWARDED COSTS OF SUIT PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.
